About JanoEnergy

Full-chain service provider in new energy development, investment, construction, and operation

Company Profile

JanoEnergy New Energy Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China. The company focuses on the development, investment, construction, and operation of new energy, committed to becoming an industry-leading full-chain service provider.

Our business covers wind power, solar PV, energy storage, and other fields, with projects spanning multiple provinces across China. With a professional technical team and rich industry experience, we provide customers with one-stop solutions from early-stage development to operation and maintenance.

Our History

2018

Company Founded

JanoEnergy New Energy Group was established in Tianjin with registered capital of 100 million RMB, beginning the layout of new energy industry.

2019

First Wind Farm Connected

Xilonghu 60MW wind farm successfully connected to grid, marking the company's official entry into new energy power generation.

2020

Solar Business Expansion

Successfully developed Guangdong Qingyuan 120MW solar project, expanding business to South China.

2021

Energy Storage Business Launch

Launched energy storage business sector, Jiangsu Yancheng 100MW storage station started construction.

2022

Installed Capacity Exceeds 1GW

Cumulative grid-connected installed capacity exceeded 1GW, annual power generation exceeds 2 billion kWh.

2023

Industry Leading Enterprise

Awarded "New Energy Industry Leading Enterprise", multiple projects won industry awards.

Core Values

Green Development

Adhere to sustainable development concept, provide clean energy for society

Innovation Driven

Continuous technological innovation, improve new energy utilization efficiency

Win-Win Cooperation

Develop together with partners, create greater value

Responsibility

Fulfill social responsibility, help achieve carbon neutrality goals
